response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, his direct experience with production-grade AI solutions, RAG architectures, and cloud-based AI system design is limited compared to the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing relevant GenAI exposure.
Proven leadership in technical discovery, mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration across multiple roles.
concerns: Lacks explicit 8+ years of building and shipping production-grade AI solutions (focus has been broader full-stack/dev-ops).
Limited demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization.
Career gap and shorter tenure at re:cinq (6 months) may raise questions about long-term commitment to GenAI specialization.
